title: Canopy Growth Corporation (CGC) Sets Sights on Australia Cannabis Market with Expanded Portfolio
text: Canopy Growth expanded operations in Australia cannabis market with enhanced product portfolio aimed at capturing growing demand. Australia operations achieved 12th consecutive record revenue quarter in Q3 2024 demonstrating strong market traction. Company operates through established distribution networks in Australian market for medical and wellness cannabis products. Rest of World sales grew 81% year-over-year in Q3 2024 with Australia contributing significantly to international growth. Company investing in product development and market positioning tailored to Australian regulatory environment and consumer preferences. Australia market offers substantial growth opportunity as medical cannabis adoption increases and regulatory framework matures. Canopy's multi-year expansion strategy in Australia includes deepening healthcare provider relationships and expanding consumer brand awareness.
